reviews.review_description: Fun casual game. Simple and addicting. Was missing a left-handed mode and Dev was helpful & responsive. Latest update has left-handed setting. 5 stars!

VR Paddle Master is a pure physics-based experience where the only goal is simple yet addictive: keep your ping pong ball bouncing on the paddle for as long as possible. The longer you last, the more items and new abilities you unlock, keeping every run fresh and rewarding.

The accuracy is spot-on, instantly transporting you back to childhood memories of bouncing a ball for hours in the summer, challenging yourself—or your friends—to keep it going just one more time.

It’s a solid foundation (early access) with huge potential to grow into more modes and challenges based on community feedback. Fun, nostalgic, and deceptively engaging—VR Paddle Master proves that sometimes the simplest concepts make the most immersive experiences.
The game is simple yet strangely addictive, ideal when you want to play something not too complicated
